title: PIGLIN SLAYER
description: New Mobs, a new Boss, new Enchantments, Structures and more.
body:
PIGLIN SLAYER is my first project in Minecraft Modding.
My objective is to add weight to Minecraft's gameplay, adding meaningful mobs and items that can integrate themselves in vanilla gameplay.
The mod features only few new blocks, no new tools and one new armor.

Inspired by the recent Zelda games, all new mobs come in three variants: Red, Black, White.
Red variants are the weakest, while White variants will pose a real treat since they usually come with special attacks to punish the player who does not fight them directly.

The player will find the new types of piglin only in the overworld in small encampments or large structures.
There are also a lot of new enchantments and some magic rings.

PIGLIN SLAYER should be compatible with all mods.
There is also a special Book craftable with 2 piglin fangs and a book.
This book should provide enough information to the player to cover all the main topics of the mod.

 

List of bugs/stuff
 

Mobs attacks animations might get desynced.
Structures generation might be too frequent, please, provide me data about this.
